title: Homes by Juix
description: Datapack adding a /trigger home command, fully customizable ! (v2.0 : new multi-home system !)
body:
# ℹ️ Vanilla Homes By Juix The Vanilla Homes pack only adds the popular **/home** command to quickly teleport you back to a strategic location. Here we will use **/trigger home** in Vanilla, but you can use a server plugin such as **MyCommand** to redirect a new **/home** command to **/trigger home**.

v2.0 is here and brings a multi-home system ! Discover all the features below ! (and don't forget to check out the Options section for customization)
# 🆕 Commands added - **_/trigger sethome_** - To set your Home at your current location - **_/trigger delhome_** - To delete your Home in order to place it somewhere else - **_/trigger home_** - To teleport to your Home
If you have more than 1 home, commands behave differently : - **_/trigger sethome_** - To set a new nth Home - **_/trigger home_** - Opens a tchat menu that lets you Delete, Customize tag & color, and Teleport to the Home you want - **_/trigger delhome_** - Opens a tchat menu that lets you only Delete the Home you want - **_/trigger home set _** - To teleport to a Home by Home ID (without opening the menu) - **_/trigger delhome set _** - To delete a Home by Home ID (without opening the menu)

💎 Features

Using /trigger sethome

 Using /trigger home

 Using /trigger delhome
Placing 3 different Homes (v2.0+)

 Customizing Homes with /trigger home (v2.0+)

 Teleporting to Homes with /trigger home (v2.0+)
Deleting a Home with /trigger delhome (v2.0+)

 Using the control panel
(command in description)
 Testing Homes count limit (v2.0+)
Testing teleportation delay

 Testing teleport canceled by damages
# 🆕 Options - **_/function datapack:vanilla_homes_datapack/config_** - To open the Config panel menu where you can change the delay before teleportation and cancel the teleportation if the player takes damages during this period, for a balanced gameplay. A new parameter you can set is a max number of Homes owned by a player (v2.0+)

![Config panel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f60011af8e3d35f2a203f31f76d39cec84a12cef.png)
# 🪳 Known issues - No known issue for now Quick report - https://juixcode.github.io/contact
# 🔃 Ask for a version You can **report a bug** or ask me to **update one of my pack to a specific version**, using one of these contact methods : - Quick message - https://juixcode.github.io/contact - My mail - juixcontact@gmail.com - The Discord server - clikc-here-to-join
# ❤️ Donations If you like my packs, you can tip me on my Ko-Fi page. Thank you so much if you do !
https://ko-fi.com/juixcode
